title: Sol pechu ketkadha lyrics Thillalangadi  Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Movie : Thillalangadi
Artists : Yuvan, Chitra, Shreya Goshal
Lyrics : Na Muthukumar

---Chitra -- 
Sol pechu ketkadha sundhariye
Nillendral nikkamal thulluriye
Neyaga poipesa pogiriye
Minsaram meley poi-modhuriye

Emandhupogahey emathipogathey
Algana aabathil maaitikondu pogadhey
Kanmoodi Yengadhey keilpakam pogathey
Ketukko avandhan Thillangadi

--Shreya Ghosal--
Avan nallapayan thaana illa kettapayan thaana
Theriyalaye Puriyalaye mella edho aanen
Avan kickil sokkiponen irukannil sokki ponen
Pidichirukka pidikalaya yaaraiketka poven

--Yuvan--
Adi penne konjanallai konjalana kobamenna
Nadadhaley un kalgal midhakutha
Nerupaga indha kadhal eriyutha
Idhu enna kadhalaley kooduvitu paigiraye
Vizhiyodu en uruvam theriyudha
Pudhidhaga oru ulagam eriyudha

--Shreya Ghosal --
Bayam bayam adhai ariyaamal selvan avan
Jeyam jeyam endru dhinam dhinam velvan avan
Alagana kallano anbana villano
Adhanaley kadhal yekkam kondayo..
Eppodhum illadha sandhosam Thandhanne
Ayyayyo adhai neeyum kondaayo

Emandhupogahey emathipogathey
Kanmoodi kondey ne sadukudu adaadhey

--Shreya Ghosal--
Ange ingum enge parkum podhum avan poomugam
Nenjai alli thooki kondu pogum avan niyabagam
Kathadi polathan kanmoodi parapaane
Penne ne nooluvitu povaaye...
Kannadi nan parhaal mundadi vandhaney
Unikindha kadhal sorgam puriyadhey

En pechu ketkadha sundhariye
Un pechu nanketka thoonduriye ....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Sol pechu ketkadha expresses the joy and excitement of love, highlighting playful interactions between lovers.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Thillalangadi, the song captures a light-hearted moment that showcases the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the beautiful voices of Chithra and Shreya Ghoshal, with music composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

Sol pechu ketkadha was released on July 4, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sol pechu ketkadha, the vibrant interplay of Chithra and Shreya Ghoshal's voices brings forth a delightful expression of love and joy. The song serves as a backdrop to a playful romantic scenario in Thillalangadi, where the characters revel in their affection for each other. With its catchy melody and lively beats, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, add a charming touch that resonates with listeners, making it a perfect anthem for weddings and festive gatherings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sol pechu ketkadha from Thillalangadi is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, featuring the enchanting voices of Chithra and Shreya Ghoshal alongside the talented Yuvan. This upbeat duet captures the essence of romance with its catchy melody and playful lyrics. Dive into the musical magic that makes this song a perfect addition to any festive occasion!
stanzaMeanings: Hey beautiful, do you hear my words? The breeze is dancing without stopping, and the light is shining brightly.
Don't let the troubles take you away. Don't let your eyes wander. Listen to what I say, Thillangadi.
Is he a good person or a bad one? I don't know, I can't understand. Something is happening slowly. I got caught in his gaze, and I got lost in his eyes. Who will I ask to find him?
Hey beautiful, do you hear my words? ...
Is it a girl or a boy? If it's a girl, why is she angry? Your steps are like fire, igniting this love. What kind of love is this? It seems to create a new world with my vision.
Fear, fear, without knowing it, he is a winner every day. Is he a beautiful stone or a loving arrow? That's why love is a game. Always, is there happiness that you have taken?
Don't let the troubles take you away. Don't let your eyes wander.
Hey beautiful, do you hear my words? ...

Wherever he goes, he takes my heart with him. He lifts my heart and takes it away with his memories. Like a bird, he flies away. You will leave with your thread... I see the mirror, and it comes in front of you. The love you have is not understood.
I got lost because of you, and because of you, I found the sweetness of love.
Hey beautiful, do you hear my words? Your words are making me feel alive...
